title: feat: Add configurable external links to sidebar via Helm values
author: Rohith-Saran

findings.description: First commit subject 'feat: add configurable external links...' uses Conventional Commits style instead of required 'area: SubArea: Description' format. Rebase and amend needed.
PR body still contains unresolved placeholder 'Fixes #<issue-number>'. Replace with real issue number or remove.
externalLinks not added to config.properties in values.schema.json. Adding an array schema entry would enable IDE autocomplete and document the field.
safeLinkUrl: add a brief comment explaining that only the scheme is lowercased to prevent future lowercase regression.
safeLinkUrl fix correctly limits lowercasing to scheme only, preserving case-sensitive path components.
getConfig initialises externalLinks to []ExternalLink{} (not nil) before encoding — frontend always receives an array, never null.
